raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I made 3 charges along with others in order to book a flight from XXXX XXXX to XXXX XXXX- with a stop in XXXX. After XX/XX/year> I disputed 3 charges in the amount of {$630.00} each one for a total amount of {$1800.00} for XXXX purchases. My father became sick with XXXX and was hospitalized for a few days in the emergency and admitted to the hospital. He then was released from the hospital and admitted back to the hospital for over a week with extreme XXXX. Therefore my father, mother and myself were unable to board the plane because he was hospitalized. XXXX submitted the no show tickets to Citi and Citi closed/resolved the matter without taking into account or requesting the Hospital records stating that my father had an emergency and it was the reason we were not able to get on the flights. After XX/XX/year> Citi said the matter was resolved and closed my dispute, without requesting additional information or evidence from me.
